regional_cost_note: Plumbers in Hastings typically charge $90–$120/hr plus GST. Most charge no call-out fee during business hours (e.g. Warren Plumbing charges $90/hr with no call-out). Emergency and after-hours callouts add $80–$150. Master Plumber certification provides a workmanship guarantee — worth checking at masterplumbers.co.nz.

businesses.name: Alchemy Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Hawke's Bay's highest-rated plumbing company; specialises in solar hot water, underfloor heating, gas fitting and 24/7 emergency callouts.

businesses.name: Jordy's Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Voted #1 Best Plumber in Hastings; locally owned team with over 100 years combined experience, known for punctuality and first-visit fixes.

businesses.name: Advanced Plumbing, Drainage & Gas
businesses.known_for: Award-winning Hawke's Bay firm established 2009; 50+ skilled professionals covering residential, commercial, drainage and gas across the region.

businesses.name: A Plus Plumbing & Gas
businesses.known_for: Owner-operated since 2020 with a certified 8-person team; offers 24/7 emergency callouts across Hastings, Napier and Havelock North.

businesses.name: Plumbers HB
businesses.known_for: Team includes NZ Plumber, Drainlayer & Gasfitter of the Year 2021; full residential and commercial service across Hastings, Napier and Central Hawke's Bay.

businesses.name: East Coast Plumbing and Gas
businesses.known_for: 30+ years' experience; certifying-level licensed Master Plumbers specialising in central heating, hot water solutions and drainage.

businesses.name: Cape Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Registered Master Plumbers serving Hastings and Napier; praised for same-day response and transparent pricing on hot water and drainage jobs.

businesses.name: Turfrey Hawke's Bay
businesses.known_for: 40+ years in the industry; full-service plumbing, roofing, drainage and HVAC from a nationally recognised Master Plumbers franchise.

businesses.name: Warren Plumbing
businesses.known_for: Certifying plumber and gasfitter with 20 years' experience; transparent $90/hr rate with no call-out fee during business hours.

businesses.name: Hawke's Bay Plumbing & Gas
businesses.known_for: Local specialists in residential plumbing, gasfitting and drainlaying across the Hawke's Bay region.
